quote: The audience is so much smarter than people give them credit for.
If you're going to make a film, the only way it'll succeed is if you make the film you want to see.

We don't make movies for critics. We make them for the audience.
I'd rather make the wrong decision than no decision at all.
Every time we say 'no' to something, it's because we believe in something else more.
